name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with Auto NC Optimizer for an even more personalized experience. Exceptional sound quality with a newly designed 30mm driver unit and crystal-clear hands-free calling with 4 beamforming microphones.
features: Industry-leading noise cancellation with Auto NC Optimizer
30mm driver unit with exceptional high-frequency reproduction
30-hour battery life with quick charging (3 min charge = 3 hours playback)
Multipoint connection allows pairing with two Bluetooth devices simultaneously
Speak-to-Chat automatically pauses music when you start a conversation

name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones
description: Bose Immersive Audio delivers a spatial experience that makes music feel more real. World-class noise cancellation that's quieter than ever, with CustomTune technology that personalizes sound and noise cancellation to fit you.
features: Bose Immersive Audio for a spatial sound experience
World-class noise cancellation with CustomTune technology
Up to 24 hours of battery life
Luxurious protein leather cushions with plush memory foam
Aware Mode with ActiveSense for natural transparency

name: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless Headphones
description: Audiophile-grade wireless headphones with a 60-hour battery life and adaptive noise cancellation. Features Sennheiser's signature sound with a 42mm transducer system for detailed, immersive listening.
features: Sennheiser signature sound with 42mm transducer system
Exceptional 60-hour battery life
Adaptive noise cancellation with Transparency Mode
Smart Pause automatically stops music when headphones are removed
Customizable sound via Sennheiser Smart Control app EQ

name: Audio-Technica ATH-M50x Professional Studio Monitor Headphones
description: Critically acclaimed studio monitor headphones trusted by audio engineers and musicians worldwide. Proprietary 45mm large-aperture drivers deliver exceptional clarity, deep bass, and an extended frequency range.
features: Proprietary 45mm large-aperture drivers with rare earth magnets
Exceptional clarity across an extended frequency range
Circumaural design contours around the ears for excellent sound isolation
90-degree swiveling earcups for easy one-ear monitoring
Includes 3 detachable cables (straight 1.2m, coiled 1.2m-3.0m, straight 3.0m)

name: Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones
description: Lightweight wireless headphones with integrated processor V1 for outstanding noise cancellation at an accessible price point. The Ambient Sound Mode lets you stay aware of your surroundings while enjoying your music.
features: Sony Integrated Processor V1 for effective noise cancellation
Lightweight design at just 192g for all-day comfort
35-hour battery life with quick charge support
Ambient Sound Mode for situational awareness
Multipoint connection for seamless switching between devices

name: Bose QuietComfort 45 Headphones
description: Iconic noise-canceling headphones with signature Bose sound and world-class quieting. Soft, plush cushions and a lightweight build ensure long-lasting comfort for hours of listening.
features: World-class noise cancellation for immersive listening
Aware Mode for hearing your surroundings
Up to 24 hours of battery life per charge
High-fidelity audio with proprietary Active EQ
TriPort acoustic architecture for deep, clear sound

name: Sonos Era 300 Wireless Speaker
description: The next generation of spatial audio at home with Dolby Atmos support. Six strategically placed drivers, including upward-firing tweeters, create an immersive soundstage that fills the room with brilliant, lifelike sound.
features: Dolby Atmos support for immersive spatial audio
Six drivers including upward-firing tweeters for room-filling sound
Trueplay tuning adapts to your room's acoustics
Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connectivity with AirPlay 2 support
Works seamlessly with the entire Sonos ecosystem

name: JBL Charge 5 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: A portable powerhouse with bold JBL Original Pro Sound, a built-in power bank, and IP67 waterproof and dustproof construction. Enjoy 20 hours of playtime and use JBL PartyBoost to wirelessly connect multiple speakers.
features: JBL Original Pro Sound with optimized driver and dual bass radiators
IP67 waterproof and dustproof for outdoor adventures
20-hour battery life with integrated power bank to charge devices
JBL PartyBoost for wirelessly linking multiple JBL speakers
Durable fabric and rugged silicone construction

name: Sonos Era 100 Wireless Speaker
description: A next-generation compact speaker that delivers detailed stereo sound from a single unit. Dual tweeters create a wide, rich soundstage perfect for any room in the home.
features: Two angled tweeters for rich stereo sound from a single speaker
Trueplay tuning technology adapts sound to your room
Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and AirPlay 2 connectivity
Pair two for immersive home theater surround sound
Built-in Amazon Alexa and Sonos Voice Control

name: JBL Flip 6 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: A compact portable speaker that packs serious punch with JBL Pro Sound, a separate tweeter and dual passive bass radiators. IP67 waterproof and dustproof, it goes anywhere your adventures take you.
features: JBL Pro Sound with separate tweeter and optimized racetrack-shaped woofer
IP67 waterproof and dustproof rating
12 hours of playtime on a single charge
JBL PartyBoost connects multiple compatible speakers
Bold, eye-catching design available in multiple colors

name: Sony SRS-XB100 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: An ultra-portable speaker with surprisingly powerful sound from Sony's Sound Diffusion Processor. The IP67-rated design and detachable strap make it the ideal companion for life on the go.
features: Sound Diffusion Processor for clear, wide-ranging sound
IP67 waterproof and dustproof for worry-free use
16-hour battery life for extended listening
Built-in microphone for hands-free calls
Detachable multiway strap for easy attachment to bags and gear

name: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) with USB-C
description: The most advanced AirPods ever with the H2 chip delivering smarter noise cancellation and immersive spatial audio. Adaptive Audio dynamically blends Transparency and Active Noise Cancellation for the best listening experience.
features: Apple H2 chip with 2x more effective Active Noise Cancellation
Adaptive Audio seamlessly blends transparency and noise cancellation
Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking
Touch control for volume, playback, and calls with swipe gestures
Up to 6 hours listening time (30 hours total with MagSafe charging case)

name: Sony WF-1000XM5 Truly Wireless Noise-Canceling Earbuds
description: Sony's smallest and lightest truly wireless earbuds with industry-leading noise cancellation powered by the Integrated Processor V2 and QN2e chip. High-Resolution Audio delivers studio-quality sound with LDAC codec support.
features: Industry-leading noise cancellation with Integrated Processor V2
Dynamic Driver X for powerful bass and clear vocals
Hi-Res Audio Wireless with LDAC codec support
Speak-to-Chat and Quick Attention modes
IPX4 water resistance with foam ear tips for secure fit

name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds
description: World-class noise cancellation meets Bose Immersive Audio for a truly spatial listening experience in a compact earbud form factor. CustomTune technology personalizes sound and noise cancellation to your ear shape.
features: Bose Immersive Audio with spatial sound
World-class noise cancellation with CustomTune technology
Comfortable fit with stability bands and three tip sizes
Up to 6 hours battery life (24 hours with charging case)
Aware Mode with ActiveSense for natural transparency

name: JBL Tune Flex True Wireless Noise-Canceling Earbuds
description: Versatile true wireless earbuds with Active Noise Cancellation and JBL Pure Bass Sound at an affordable price. The open-ear design with removable ear tips lets you switch between in-ear and open-ear wearing styles.
features: JBL Pure Bass Sound with 12.4mm drivers
Active Noise Cancellation and Ambient Aware modes
Switchable open-ear or in-ear wearing styles
32 hours total playtime (8 hours + 24 hours with case)
IPX5 water resistance for workouts

name: Sennheiser Momentum True Wireless 4 Earbuds
description: Audiophile-grade true wireless earbuds with Sennheiser's TrueResponse 7mm transducer delivering extraordinary detail and depth. Adaptive Noise Cancellation and lossless Bluetooth audio via aptX Lossless codec.
features: TrueResponse 7mm transducer for audiophile sound quality
Adaptive Noise Cancellation with Anti-Wind mode
aptX Lossless for CD-quality wireless audio
30-hour total battery life with fast charging
Splash-resistant IP54 rating for everyday durability

specs.Codec Support: SBC, AAC, aptX, aptX Lossless, LC3

name: Apple AirPods 4 with Active Noise Cancellation
description: A breakthrough open-ear design powered by the H2 chip with Active Noise Cancellation and Transparency mode. Personalized Spatial Audio creates an immersive experience, all without ear tips for a naturally comfortable fit.
features: H2 chip with Active Noise Cancellation in an open-ear design
Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking
Adaptive Audio blends ANC and Transparency automatically
USB-C charging case with 30 hours total battery life
Voice Isolation for crystal-clear phone calls

name: Audio-Technica AT-LP120XBT-USB Wireless Direct-Drive Turntable
description: A fully manual direct-drive turntable with Bluetooth wireless connectivity and USB output for digital conversion. Built on the legacy of the iconic AT-LP120 series, it delivers professional-grade vinyl playback with modern convenience.
features: Direct-drive high-torque motor for consistent speed and quick start-up
Bluetooth wireless streaming to compatible speakers and headphones
USB output for digitizing your vinyl collection
AT-VM95E Dual Moving Magnet cartridge pre-installed
Three playback speeds: 33-1/3, 45, and 78 RPM

name: Audio-Technica AT-LPW50PB Fully Manual Belt-Drive Turntable
description: A premium belt-drive turntable with a piano black MDF chassis designed to reduce resonance and improve sound quality. The carbon-fiber tonearm and AT-VM95E cartridge deliver warm, detailed audio from your vinyl collection.
features: Belt-drive design with anti-resonance MDF plinth in piano black finish
Carbon-fiber tonearm for precise tracking and reduced vibration
AT-VM95E Dual Moving Magnet phono cartridge included
Built-in switchable phono/line preamp for flexible connectivity
Speed selection: 33-1/3 and 45 RPM with sensor-monitored motor

name: Sony PS-LX310BT Belt-Drive Turntable with Bluetooth
description: A sleek, fully automatic belt-drive turntable with one-step Bluetooth pairing for wireless streaming to speakers and soundbars. The simple, intuitive design makes it perfect for vinyl newcomers and seasoned collectors alike.
features: One-button Bluetooth pairing for wireless streaming
Fully automatic operation with auto start/stop
Belt-drive design for smooth, stable playback
Built-in phono preamp with gain switch for flexible setup
Two speed settings: 33-1/3 and 45 RPM
